column_description: the unique identifier of the data quality issue
the id of the customer with the data issue
the name of the field with the issue
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Examples: date_of_birth, address, phone_number, email, full_name, etc.

column_description: the type of data quality issue
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Common types: Missing Data, Invalid Format, Inconsistent Data, Duplicate Entry, Outdated Information

column_description: the date when the issue was identified
whether the issue has been resolved
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
1 means the issue has been resolved, 0 means still pending resolution.
